CompaniesPepsiCoShake-Up: Layoffs, Product Line Cuts And Major Restructuring — Everything You Need to Know Edited by: Priya Raghuvanshi Updated Dec 9,2025, 10:52 IST The reset is expected to include shuttering select manufacturing lines and focusing more aggressively on affordability. [PepsiCo announces organizational changes to accelerate growth]
These organizational changes strengthen the progress we have made and positionPepsiCoto capturenewopportunities for growth. With a sharpened focus, enhanced leadership and an integrated approach, we believe we are well-positioned to perform to our full potential and deliver value for our customers, consumers, shareholders and employees.

[PepsiCo Faces Operational Overhaul as Consumer Tastes Shift]
Despite reporting stronger-than-anticipated quarterly results on October 8, 2025—with earnings per share reaching $2.29 and revenue hitting $23.94 billion—PepsiCo's Frito-Lay division has demonstrated worrying trends. Both product volume and revenue within this segment have declined by 2 percent through2025.
